perks.summary: preflight credentials/control-plane then run the submit-time guard before an OSMO VDA + auto-labeling GPU submit (destructive)
generate per-video Cosmos augmentation configs + manifest from an input-video dir and a pipeline config dir (deterministic, read-only inputs)
pull the NVIDIA VDA demo videos from Hugging Face and flatten them into one demo input directory
render a side-by-side comparison MP4 (input vs augmented) from a locally-staged VDA run (read-only inputs)
